description_long: This apple is round with a slightly irregular, natural shape and a short, brown stem protruding from the top. Its skin displays a blend of pale yellow and soft red hues, with the red blush concentrated more on one side and fading into creamy yellow on the other. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light in several spots, and appears free of any significant blemishes or damage. The apple's coloration and subtle gradients suggest a fresh, ripe fruit, likely of a sweet variety. The stem is intact and slightly curved, adding to the realistic appearance. No stickers, labels, or other markings are visible on the skin.
description: A round, glossy apple with a red-yellow gradient and a short brown stem.
description_view_0: Front view shows a mostly yellow apple with a red blush on the upper left and a centered, upright stem.
description_view_1: This side reveals more red coloration, especially on the lower left, and a slightly angled stem.
description_view_2: The apple appears paler, with a larger yellow area and a subtle red patch near the top.
description_view_3: This view highlights the most intense red coloration, covering much of the visible surface.
